message:
feat: generate all 5 LearnSignal kinds including primitive stumbles

verifyActResult now distinguishes timeout (timed_out flag), failure,
error (stumbles), and inefficiency (success but >10 turns). Added TODO
for retry detection. verifyPrimitiveResult returns LearnSignal on
failure when sessionId is provided. agent.ts wires primitive signals
to the learn process and passes timed_out into ActResult.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
